With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go.

programme.title: Island Odyssey - EP 5
programme.desc: The hosts will form teams to travel to islands in Malaysia and Taiwan respectively to experience local life and see the most beautiful things from their own perspectives. They will be visiting Selangor, Tioman Island, Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Quarantine Island, Sarawak in Malaysia, and Kinmen, Matsu, Penghu Chimei and Xiaoliuqiu in Taiwan.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: The Cave Of The Yellow Dog
programme.desc: Nansal, a Mongolian nomadic girl finds a puppy and brings it home but her father believes it to be bad luck. But when the dog saves the family’s baby, he finally accepts it. Central to this tale is the belief in the cycle of rebirth between man and dog.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Hush Little Baby
programme.desc: After a lantern parade, two-year-old Paulina is found missing from her room. The chilling kidnapping hurls Investigator Martin Bruhl back into a sleepless nightmare he experienced two years ago.

programme.title: Cash On Delivery
programme.desc: This tale depicts the pain, prejudice, and guilt of a young man who is filled with fear and doubt about apples and the apple bearers because of a past incident in which he brutalizes his partner due to an apple-related event.

programme.title: Love At First Fight
programme.desc: Between his friends and the family business, Arnaud's summer looks set to be a peaceful one. Peaceful until he runs into Madeleine, as beautiful as she is brusque, a concrete block of tensed muscles and doomsday prophecies.

programme.title: Deserted
programme.desc: While on assignment to the Sinai coast, Swedish photojournalist Ingrid is kidnapped by a group of Palestinian men and hidden in the desert. An unlikely love affair arises between Ingrid and one of her captors, Ali.

programme.title: Murders in Amboise
programme.desc: When a violinist is found murdered near da Vinci’s tomb in a pose similar to The Vitruvian Man, Captain Alban Dutertre returns home to investigate. As more da Vinci-inspired killings follow, he and Bérénice Amarillo link this to a missing young artist.

programme.title: Red, White And Brass
programme.desc: In a bid to sneak into the Tonga vs France rugby match, superfan Maka invents a fake band to perform for the pre-game show. With the match coming soon, Maka and his friends have four weeks to come up with a performance

programme.title: Silent Screams
programme.desc: A young doctor is confronted with bad cases of abused children. She is shocked at how complicated it is to hold parents accountable. When a baby is killed, she decides to take a more active role, risking her medical license and her own life.

programme.title: Above the Clouds
programme.desc: After losing his parents in a flood, 15-year-old Andy is forced to live in the Mountain Province with his estranged grandfather. Feeling they’ve lost everything, the two embark on a journey and start to come to terms with their grief.

programme.title: I Am Dating You Not
programme.desc: Roberto loves Paula but she still can’t get over her ex-boyfriend. Meanwhile Roberto’s former girlfriend wants him back. Could office romance get more complicated? A romantic farce starring Virginia Rodríquez, Best Actress, Malaga Film Festival 2013.

programme.title: Bluebird
programme.desc: In small town Maine, a school bus driver becomes distracted during her end-of-day inspection and fails to notice a sleeping boy in the back of the bus. What happens next shatters the tranquillity of her small logging town.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows Hush Little Baby
programme.desc: After a lantern parade, two-year-old Paulina is found missing from her room. The chilling kidnapping hurls Investigator Martin Bruhl back into a sleepless nightmare he experienced two years ago.

programme.title: Deserted
programme.desc: While on assignment to the Sinai coast, Swedish photojournalist Ingrid is kidnapped by a group of Palestinian men and hidden in the desert. An unlikely love affair arises between Ingrid and one of her captors, Ali.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: In post-COVID Tokyo, single mother Megumi is desperate to find her missing son Shinpei. After a shady young man claims to know her son’s whereabouts, he is invited into Megumi’s home where he soon uncovers a shocking secret.

programme.title: Murders in Amboise
programme.desc: When a violinist is found murdered near da Vinci’s tomb in a pose similar to The Vitruvian Man, Captain Alban Dutertre returns home to investigate. As more da Vinci-inspired killings follow, he and Bérénice Amarillo link this to a missing young artist.

programme.title: The Kiss
programme.desc: In 1913 Denmark, young officer Anton grapples with duty and love when he befriends Baron von Løvenskjold's daughter, Edith, confined to a wheelchair. As their bond deepens, Anton is ensnared in a web of promises and lies, torn between pity and true love.

programme.title: Temporaries
programme.desc: Ariane gets a job as an interpreter at a food plant after moving back to the Richelieu Valley following a breakup. There, she finds herself torn between obeying the harsh demands of her boss and standing up for the exploited migrant workers she befriends.

programme.title: I Am Dating You Not
programme.desc: Roberto loves Paula but she still can’t get over her ex-boyfriend. Meanwhile Roberto’s former girlfriend wants him back. Could office romance get more complicated? A romantic farce starring Virginia Rodríquez, Best Actress, Malaga Film Festival 2013.

programme.title: Catch The Wind
programme.desc: Edith is a middle-aged woman, estranged from her son and now about to lose her job as a textile factory worker. With nothing to hold her to her hometown, she decides to move to Morocco where her factory has relocated instead of facing unemployment.

programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: Murder in the Finist
programme.desc: When a storm fells a sacred oak in Brittany, Captain Morgane Ledantec uncovers human bones tied to a druidic past she once shared. As Morgane’s buried gift of foresight resurfaces, she must confront old friends hiding secrets of their own.

programme.title: My Killer Buddy
programme.desc: Denni is 10 years old and has a mission, to save his mother from his father’s violence. For this reason he devises an infallible plan: he will have him killed by someone who kills people for a living, a super-killer.

programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Circulon 125
programme.desc: High Strength Activated Ginkgo to Boost Your Mind and Circulation Thomson Circulon 125 – 125mg of Activated Ginkgo Biloba enhanced with cutting-edge Japanese Activated Technology for superior absorption. It helps to boost blood circulation, concentration, and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve cold and numb hands and feet caused by poor blood circulation. 更高含量活性银杏，有助于提升您的思维和血液循环 Thomson Circulon 125 – 125 毫克高含量活性银杏精华，采用日本尖端活性技术，提升吸收率。它有助于促进血液循环、集中注意力、提升思维清晰度。有助于缓解因血液循环不良而产生的手脚冰冷麻痹等状况。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - PHS HAIRSCIENCE HOM/FEM Anti-Hair Loss Bundle
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns. FEM & HOM 防脱发套组，恢复头皮健康，减少男女头发稀疏问题。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 10
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 35
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 2
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. programme.title: Sembang Sihat S3 - EP 12
programme.desc: Hosted by Ainon Talib and Zuhairi Idris, Sembang Sihat takes on a fresh, gripping new direction — blending health education with medical mystery storytelling to create a more interactive, relatable, and engaging viewer experience.

programme.title: Durrani - Perjuangan Lion Mum - EP 2
programme.desc: Durrani forges ahead and wins her case. But her triumph is short-lived when a tragic incident ensues, sending Durrani into an emotional, guilt-ridden tailspin. Depressed, Durrani wants to give up family law altogether, but she pulls herself together and is determined to redeem herself. She takes on another divorce case, bringing Durrani and Roslina together this time as allies.

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 48

Marlia now realizes that her paradise of happiness is with Nur Muhammad, her son.
